name: robinnnnn--dj-mp3-sourcer
description: Download music from links (YouTube, Spotify, etc.) by finding the best available source. Searches across platforms in priority order: Bandcamp, Beatport, Amazon Music, Spotify (via spotdl), YouTube (via yt-dlp). Use when a user sends music links and wants high-quality audio files downloaded, or when batch-downloading tracks from mixed sources. Handles single tracks or batch lists. Surfaces purchase links for paid platforms, downloads directly from free sources. Default output is MP3 320k. Supports a "free only" mode that skips paid platforms entirely.
